title: Special Enchants Required Resource Pack
description: This is a required resource pack for all my special enchants datapacks. There is no other reason you should use it
body:
# Special Enchants Required Ressourcepack
Hey, this is a resource pack for my "special enchants" datapacks. There is no other reason you would want this datapack since it only changes certain item if they have a special tag.

## The New items
This is a list of all the new items created with this resource pack:
- Flame Ball -> for the smelt enchant
- Resize Card -> for the hammer enchant
- Speedup Card -> for the fast forward enchant
